checks.summary: No forbidden runtime reads or imports

validated_rules: compiler review decision is approved, subject-bound, and hash-current
assurance input index binds compiler output refs, schema refs, validator refs, and invalidation inputs
artifact envelope upstream_hashes reject malformed sha256 values
implementation workpack index must include the workpack template workpack id
assurance input index rejects unknown compiler output refs and missing traceability refs
assurance input index rejects schema hash drift and validator hash drift
read-only QA writes only READ_ONLY_QA_REPORT.md and qa_finding_index.json and mutates no compiled artifact
trace rows are single-duty and code targets stay inside allowed paths
test obligations match trace rows and include positive and negative cases
implementation workpack index references known trace rows and deterministic generated_at
skill binding remains subordinate to specs, validators, locks, review gates, and source authority
traceability exceptions require human gate decision and scope delta
final assurance cannot pass with blocking findings or in-candidate lock creation
